name: Connector & Plugin Builder
description: Use this skill when the user asks Prometheus to integrate, connect to, or build a plugin for a service Prometheus doesn't already support (e.g. "connect to Airtable", "add my company's REST API", "hook up Shopify", "make an MCP for X", "add a custom connector"). Prometheus researches the API, writes a manifest (+ index.js for REST APIs, or an MCP preset for services with an MCP server) into the user data dir, installs it via the extensions API, hot-reloads, and verifies — no source access or restart needed. The user then enters credentials in the Connections panel.

resources.description: Every manifest field for prometheus.extension.json, with a full REST connector example.
The CommonJS index.js runtime module contract (register/registerTool/execute/ctx.getCredential) with a full worked Airtable example.
Zero-code MCP server connectors via kind=mcp_preset manifests with credential env templating.
